allow: PowerShell($sessions = @\("E:\\Claude code\\mybot\\data\\sessions\\bot_session.session-journal", "E:\\Claude code\\mybot\\data\\sessions\\leads_session.session-journal"\); foreach \($f in $sessions\) { $proc = \(& "C:\\Windows\\System32\\handle64.exe" $f 2>$null\); if \($proc\) { $proc } else { "handle64 недоступен" } })

hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))"); [ -z "$FILE" ] && exit 0; git -C "E:/Claude code/mybot" add "$FILE"; git -C "E:/Claude code/mybot" diff --cached --quiet && exit 0; BASENAME=$(basename "$FILE"); git -C "E:/Claude code/mybot" commit -m "auto: update $BASENAME" && git -C "E:/Claude code/mybot" push origin master 2>/dev/null || true
